title: Herbal Silky Millet Stir-Fry
description: This Herbal Silky Millet Stir-Fry is a delicious one-pot Mediterranean dish featuring millet, steamed vegetables, and aromatic herbs, ideal for Jain-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed herbs like dill and parsley, finely chopped

instructions: Rinse the millet and drain it. In a medium saucepan, bring water or vegetable broth to a boil.
Stir in the rinsed millet and reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for about 15 minutes until liquid is absorbed and millet is tender.
While millet is cooking, dice bell peppers and zucchini into small pieces. In a large skillet, heat olive oil or ghee over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed herbs and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant. Then add diced vegetables to the skillet with the herbs, and sauté for another 5 minutes until slightly softened.
Once millet is cooked, remove from heat and let it cool slightly. Gently fold in cooled millet into the vegetable mixture with a spatula or spoon.
Season with salt and serve hot as your main dish.
